template: directive: simple line drawing + single splash of color illustrative of subject; this piece is off-the-board scattered artisan
subject: Off-the-board artisan-keycap scatter for the GSK Sweet Nightmare resin run. Five 3/4 top-down keycap silhouettes are hand-arranged across the canvas with slight per-cap rotation variation (between -9 and +11 degrees) so they read as spilled from a tray rather than CAD-snapped to a grid. The central cap is the focal variant: coral splash fill, coral border, paler coral inner top-surface, and a small coral 4-point sparkle glyph just above-right as artisan flourish. The four flanking caps remain warm-grey outline only. Subtle floor-shadow ellipses ground each cap. No board outline, no case edges, no keyboard chrome.
brief_summary: Hero art for the news-pillar companion piece to the GSK Sweet Nightmare artisan-resin group-buy listing. The article covers an 8-variant matrix (4 colorways × 2 finishes) of artisan resin keycaps — explicitly an off-the-board artisan piece, not a full set on a board. Composition expresses that with a scattered hand-arranged keycap layout, single coral splash on the focal cap, and a tiny coral sparkle for artisan flair.
composition_decision: scattered off-the-board arrangement — 5 keycaps, slight rotation variation, one central focal cap in coral, four warm-grey outline-only caps; no board, no case edges, no keyboard chrome

splash_color.name: coral
splash_color.applied_to: central focal cap (cap 3) + tiny 4-point sparkle glyph above-right of the focal cap

bronze_accent.name: warm-bronze
bronze_accent.usage: hairline (1px) frame inset 32px from canvas perimeter, rounded 6px corners, 0.45 stroke opacity
bronze_accent.rationale: no case edge exists on this off-the-board composition, so the bronze is reframed as an unobtrusive velvet-card-style perimeter hairline rather than skipped entirely; reads as a display surround rather than a hard rectangle

tokens_snapshot: design/tokens.css sha 51fdae8368c1eee844850352ec620acd2f822555 — --kh-accent oklch(0.80 0.135 75); coral splash from canonical hero-art coral family

cap_3_center_FOCAL.treatment: coral splash fill + coral border + pale-coral inner top surface + sparkle highlight
cap_3_center_FOCAL.size_bump: 180x170 vs 140x130 baseline — reads as the showpiece

sparkle_glyph.shape: 4-point star (two crossed strokes) with soft coral center dot
sparkle_glyph.position: (720, 340) — above and right of the focal cap

style_guide: bearings.md § Article hero art (locked 2026-05-09): 2px warm-grey stroke throughout; single splash (coral) on the focal cap + tiny coral sparkle glyph; warm-bronze used as a faint perimeter hairline frame in lieu of a case edge; no multi-color, no blues or greens; transparent canvas; no board outline, no case edges, no keyboard chrome.
xml_validity: validated — no double-hyphen runs inside comments; parses as well-formed XML
